title: スプリンターズSの後に・マイルへ

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I did it! I zoomed past Flower and took
first place!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: This is real evidence that I'm new and improved!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, now that I've won, are you finally
convinced?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Have I finally shown you that I'm both a
representative and an exemplary Umamusume
capable of running any race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm convinced. She's made incredible
developments as a Sprinter over these three
years. Now we might just be able to...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So, we should make my next race—
choice_data_list: Shall we try running the Mile Championship?
Shall we try running the Mile Championship?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wait just a second! Isn't the Mile
Championship a...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's 400 meters longer than her specialty... but I
know she can win it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wonderful! I'm so glad to finally enter one!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
1,600 meters! It's got a lovely ring to it, just like
"class representative!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will definitely live up to your expectations,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we decide our next race will be
the Mile Championship!
